title: A Crew Member on the Line
description: Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They definitely looked like pirates though...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So it's the same as always.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Woohoo! It's a huge grass plain!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I-it's so long! The bear is looming!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Even the trees here are super lanky.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Guys, look! Isn't that a house?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I wonder if there are any shipwrights?

summary: Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.
